title: elaphoglossum oculatum
intro: Elaphoglossum oculatum, also known as the eye shield fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of eye and skin infections, as well as fever and inflammation. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum oculatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable asset in natural remedies. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum oculatum is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are applied topically to affected areas or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
